title: hieracium amplexicaule subsp. pseudocerinthoides
intro: Hieracium amplexicaule subsp. pseudocerinthoides, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Hieracium amplexicaule subsp. pseudocerinthoides include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and infections.
